📋 Prescription Analysis:

✅ Medications Added:
{{meds}}

• Keep medications in a cool, dry place

landing.hero_description: An integrated platform for electronic medical record management that supports patients, doctors, and healthcare teams with the latest AI technologies to improve care quality.
landing.feature_heading: Everything you need in one system
landing.feature_subtitle: From patient management to lab, radiology, prescriptions, and AI support, everything is fully integrated.
landing.stats_subtitle: A reliable digital foundation for modern care delivery.
landing.contact_subtitle: Book a demo or speak to our team to see the platform in action.

landingPage.featurePatientsDesc: Integrated medical records, appointments, reminders, and easy patient follow-up
landingPage.featureDoctorsDesc: Role-specific dashboards with advanced examination and diagnostic tools
landingPage.featureLabRadDesc: Manage lab and radiology requests, upload results and files easily
landingPage.featurePharmacyDesc: E-prescriptions, inventory management, and medication dispensing tracking
landingPage.featureAIDesc: Complaint analysis, diagnosis suggestions, and medical result explanations
landingPage.featureFinanceDesc: Salaries, revenues, expenses, and accurate financial reports
landingPage.testimonial1Quote: The AI EHR system has completely changed my workflow. I can now follow up with my patients more efficiently and in less time.
landingPage.testimonial2Quote: Having easy access to my medical reports and lab results anytime is truly amazing.
landingPage.testimonial3Quote: Financial and medical data analysis has become much easier. The system saves a lot of time and effort.
landingPage.footerCopyright: © {{year}} AI EHR System. All rights reserved.
